task_completion.description: Open the target manuscript document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Calligra Words application (or similar word processor) is open with 'frankenstein_manuscript.odt' visible in the title bar or document tab.

task_completion.description: Format chapter titles as Heading 1 and bold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Headings such as 'Letter 1', 'Letter 2', or 'Chapter 1' appear larger and bolded. The style selector in the toolbar should indicate 'Heading 1' when a heading is selected.

task_completion.description: Standardize the body text font to 12pt, correcting paragraphs with wrong fonts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraphs starting with 'I am already far north...', 'But it is a still greater evil...', 'I shall certainly find no friend...', or 'Last Monday I was invited...' match the standard serif font of the rest of the document, and the font size dropdown in the toolbar shows '12' when body text is selected.

task_completion.description: Set all body text alignment to justified, correcting previously centered paragraphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Paragraphs starting with 'You will rejoice to hear...', 'This expedition has been...', and 'There is something at work...' have flush left and right margins. The 'Justify' alignment button in the toolbar should be highlighted when body text is selected.

task_completion.description: Properly render italicized emphasis for specific phrases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Phrases such as 'Ancient Mariner', 'Prometheus', 'what can stop the determined heart', 'paradise of my own creation', and 'tabula rasa' appear slanted (italicized) in the text.

task_completion.description: Remove incorrect bold formatting from specific words.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The words 'supernatural', 'electricity', and 'magnetism' appear in normal font weight, matching the surrounding text, and the 'Bold' button is NOT highlighted when they are selected.
The 'Save' icon in the toolbar is greyed out (indicating no unsaved changes), or a save dialog/notification is visible confirming the file has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor (like Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer) to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI word processor application, not terminal commands (like sed/awk) or python scripts modifying the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter the actual text content of the manuscript.
integrity.visual_evidence: Keywords like 'St. Petersburgh', 'Margaret Saville', 'natural philosophy', and 'galvanism' are still present and unaltered in the text.

integrity.description: The agent did not add extraneous text, notes, or copy-paste instructions into the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document contains only the manuscript text, with no visible agent notes, task descriptions, or unrelated text blocks inserted.
